_comment: sites/common_site_config.json  –  bench-level defaults, applies to ALL sites
_bucket_note: REQUIRED when use_r2=1. Use a plain bucket name OR bucket/folder/subfolder. The first segment is the S3 bucket name passed to the API; any extra path segments become a root prefix inside the bucket that is prepended to every object key.
_scenario_E: Optional prefix strategy. Omit this key to preserve the current site-name based layout.
